ecosystem.clawhub_landing: 30 skills, 12 plugins displayed — highlights: Self-Improving Agent (3.9k★), Skill Vetter (1.2k★), Proactive Agent (814★), Agent Browser (434★), Ontology (648★), Gog/Google Workspace (933★)
ecosystem.security_landscape: ClawHub now shows publisher handles, signed manifests, moderated releases, lineage tracking, SkillScan integration (391★) for security gating
ecosystem.format_adoption: SKILL.md open format adopted by Claude Code, Codex CLI, ChatGPT (LobeHub)

newly_notable_skills_2026.name: SkillScan
newly_notable_skills_2026.author: tokauthai
newly_notable_skills_2026.description: Security gate for skills — every new skill MUST pass SkillScan before use
newly_notable_skills_2026.recommendation: monitor — interesting concept for automated skill vetting, but we already do manual vetting per AGENTS.md policy

newly_notable_skills_2026.name: Ontology
newly_notable_skills_2026.author: oswalpalash
newly_notable_skills_2026.description: Typed knowledge graph for structured agent memory and composable skills
newly_notable_skills_2026.recommendation: skip — MEMORY.md + memory/*.md pattern already serves our needs; knowledge graph is overkill for current scale

newly_notable_skills_2026.name: AdMapix
newly_notable_skills_2026.author: fly0pants
newly_notable_skills_2026.description: Raw data layer for ad creatives, apps, rankings, downloads/revenue
newly_notable_skills_2026.recommendation: skip — no ad intelligence use case

newly_notable_skills_2026.name: Nano Banana Pro
newly_notable_skills_2026.author: steipete
newly_notable_skills_2026.description: Generate/edit images with Gemini 3 Pro Image
newly_notable_skills_2026.recommendation: skip — meme-maker skill already covers basic image needs

newly_notable_skills_2026.name: Obsidian
newly_notable_skills_2026.author: steipete
newly_notable_skills_2026.description: Work with Obsidian vaults via obsidian-cli
newly_notable_skills_2026.recommendation: skip — we use Markdown + workspace files, not Obsidian

newly_notable_skills_2026.name: Multi Search Engine
newly_notable_skills_2026.author: gpyangyoujun
newly_notable_skills_2026.description: 16 engine integration (7 CN + 9 Global) with auto-fallback
newly_notable_skills_2026.recommendation: skip — tavily + web_search already cover search needs

security_highlights: Unit 42 Palo Alto Networks published 'Trust No Skill' series on agent supply chain verification
ClawHavoc (Koi Security): 341 malicious skills found, ~12% of catalog
Trend Micro confirmed AMOS stealer distribution via fake OpenClaw skills
arXiv study: >30% of crawled skills flagged suspicious/malicious
ClawHub now shows publisher handles + org trust on skill pages
trending_observations: Security skills (SkillScan, Skill Vetter) gaining traction — ecosystem maturing
steipete dominates top downloads with multiple utility skills (Github, Gog/Google, Weather, Nano Pdf, Nano Banana, Obsidian)
No breakthrough new skill this week that warrants installation
recommendations: Current installed skill stack remains sufficient
If ad/marketing work becomes relevant, AdMapix is worth revisiting
Monitor SkillScan development as potential replacement for manual vetting if it gains community trust
